title: Measuring AI Investment ROI: The CFO Framework
excerpt: A proven framework to quantify the real financial impact of AI projects. Cost-benefit analysis, risk quantification, and net value calculation.
author: Dr. Emre Can

title: Global Pazarlara Açılma Stratejileri
